name: CircleCI for Open Source
description: CircleCI provides generous free build credits for open-source projects on the Free Plan, covering Linux, Arm, Docker, macOS, and Windows builds.

perks.title: 400,000 Linux Credits/Month
perks.description: Up to 400,000 credits per month for Linux, Arm, and Docker builds.

perks.title: 30,000 macOS/Windows Credits
perks.description: 30,000 credits per month for macOS and Windows builds.

eligibility: Must be on CircleCI's Free Plan.
applicationProcess: Sign up for CircleCI's Free Plan.
Keep your repository public to automatically qualify for open-source credits.
requirements: Enable the "Only build pull requests" setting to reduce unnecessary builds.
